progress_summary: NEW FEATURE CYCLE (post-v1.5): /demo workbench Search & Filter — IMPLEMENTED on branch claude/relaxed-cannon-ut762y, all local gates green, PR/CI pending. User approved spec gate as-is, then said 'implement the design' (design gate approved by instruction; formal punch-list/sprint-plan gates folded into one build since spec+design were complete). DELIVERED: (1) data model — `Phase` union + required `phase` on Beat (types.ts), all 49 beats tagged across 12 scenarios via a one-shot script; (2) pure lib site/src/lib/demo-search/ — kinds.ts (normalizeKind, full corpus coverage), phases.ts, model.ts, strip.ts, index-build.ts (buildSearchIndex), engine.ts (filter/rank/facet-counts, OR-within/AND-across), url-state.ts; role map extracted to pure lib/roles.ts (skills.ts re-exports); (3) UI — demo-search.client.ts wires DesktopWorkbench (rail tabs ⌕/● + sidebar search/facet panels) + MobileWorkbench (topbar ⌕ → full-screen Find overlay), jump-to-exchange with ember-flash, shareable URL state; flag site.feature.demo-search (default true) gates it; index inlined in demo.astro (55KB gz, budget 120KB). TESTS: 32 new Vitest unit tests (kinds/index/engine/url) + index-size budget guard — full suite 423/423 green; astro check 0 errors; site build OK; 8 Playwright e2e specs written (run in CI — browser download blocked in sandbox). PRIOR (last release): v1.5.0 'Build the AI app' SHIPPED + LIVE (2026-06-22). v1.4 via stack-forge ADEV-328→337. v1.3 shipped 2026-05-08 (526a9a2). v1.6 'Cost & telemetry' (roadmap/07) is the next release theme; this demo-search feature is a standalone site enhancement.

key_decisions: Surface: /demo workbench (DesktopWorkbench + MobileWorkbench). Substantial new capability, full pipeline (discover→spec→design→roadmap→build).
Capability: workbench-scoped Search & Filter — NOT merged into the global ⌘K palette (which only indexes pages/skills/actions).
Search depth: DEEP full-text — index every exchange, beat label, and artifact body across all 12 scenarios.
Facets (all four): skill · role (7-role taxonomy from lib/skills.ts) · artifact-kind (needs build-time normalization to a controlled vocab) · pipeline-phase (needs explicit data).
Result behavior: jump-to-exchange + shareable URL state. Deep link opens transcript mode, reveals steps up to/through the target, scrolls + ember-flashes it (reuse existing flash pattern).
Phase data: EXPLICIT `phase` tags added to beats in the walkthrough model; exchanges inherit nearest-preceding beat's phase. Touches all 12 data files.
Mobile: FULL parity — MobileWorkbench gets search + facets + deep-link adapted to the bottom-tab layout.

Stack: inherited/validated (Astro 5 static SSG + Cloudflare Worker ASSETS). No platform/db/auth decision. Build-time index JSON + client filter; zero new runtime deps (hand-rolled, like SearchPalette). MiniSearch noted as fallback only if quality is insufficient.
user_preferences: Picks options when given clear choices; comfortable with 'go with defaults'.
Prefers sharp scoping questions, then approves big plans in one pass.
Answers structured AskUserQuestion rounds quickly and decisively.
Manual deploy from a wrangler-logged-in laptop is the rule; CI is verification-only.

next_actions: Push branch claude/relaxed-cannon-ut762y + open PR; let CI run (Vitest, astro check, site build, Playwright e2e, LHCI).
On green: Phase 7 launch — /oc-audit pre-deploy then manual wrangler deploy:staging (eyeball /demo search) → prod, per CLAUDE.md deploy flow.
Optional follow-ups: cross-link /skills/<id> → /demo?skill=<id>; a 'copy link to this exchange' affordance in the output lightbox (noted stretch in 02-architecture §5).

feature.title: Demo Workbench Search & Filter
feature.phase_data: explicit phase tags on beats; exchanges inherit nearest-preceding beat
feature.approach: build-time index + client-side filter; zero new runtime deps
